text.tspan: AWS Cloud Map, DNS+SRV records, etc.)

g.text: REGISTRATION FLOW (services tell the registry they exist)

text.tspan: TWO MAIN PATTERNS for HOW THE LOOKUP HAPPENS:
1. CLIENT-SIDE DISCOVERY u2014 caller queries registry directly,
does its own load balancing. (Eureka, Consul + DNS)
2. SERVER-SIDE DISCOVERY u2014 caller calls a fixed proxy/LB address;
proxy queries registry and forwards. (K8s Service, AWS ALB,
